question: This is where you put the question
answer: This is where you put the answer

question: This is where your second question goes
answer: This is where your second answer goes. Images are optional. You can see this one doesnt have an image.

question: How many FAQs can i have?
answer: You can have up to 10 FAQs per Discord server

question: How many keywords can i have?
answer: You can have up to 8 keywords per FAQ

question: How many characters can i have in a question/answer?
answer: You can have up to 1024 characters for each of the question/answer

question: How many characters can i have in a keyword?
answer: You can have up to 32 characters for each of the keywords

question: How long can image URLs be?
answer: Image URLs can be up to 128 characters long

question: It says invalid JSON when I upload the file?
answer: If your JSON formatting is invalid, you can check it for errors [here](https://jsonlint.com/)
